todaysResult.headline: Cockroach activity was moderate today.
todaysResult.body: We placed targeted bait, applied an insect growth regulator, treated cracks and crevices and placed monitoring stations today. A follow-up visit in 10–14 days is recommended to stay ahead of newly hatching activity. Please avoid store-bought sprays — they interfere with the bait placements.
todaysResult.nextStep: A follow-up visit in 10–14 days is recommended to stay ahead of newly hatching activity. Please avoid store-bought sprays — they interfere with the bait placements.
